issue.title: [server] Align custom schedule validation and setting conventions
issue.goal: Align custom schedule validation messages and annotations, and remove hidden write behavior from crawler-setting reads so local conventions match runtime behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: Custom schedule validation annotations and messages agree with the actual rule enforced.
GET-style crawler setting reads do not create or mutate database rows implicitly.
The resulting behavior is covered by targeted tests.

description: A small but real conventions drift remains in custom schedule validation and crawler setting reads. Align the annotations, messages, and side effects so the code says what it does.
